content_body: A birthday celebration is often short lived and mildly remembered when we all pass the age of 21, but with the bright mind of Justin Morris, the partying spirit of Alyssa, Mary, and Phillps, and the calm and collective decision making of Tasha, Miranda will always remember her 29th birthday in this cabin nested in a beautiful corner of Blue Ridge. Other than the video games, the whole cabin in its entirety was utilzed in the best kinds of way. Thank you for your investment and providing us the base needed to knock this weekend out of the park.
title: Birthday Celebration in the North Georgia Mountains
